comment: Imported but only an unrelated export is used (not the vuln symbol). Without symbol enrichment the engine cannot distinguish which export is called, so it conservatively returns PACKAGE_REACHABLE. This is intentional: once symbol-level advisories land this case splits into NOT_REACHABLE. Label reflects current engine capability, not a bug. Coverage: not-reachable=imported-unrelated-export (FP-suppression future).

advisories.note: Conservative PACKAGE_REACHABLE until symbol enrichment — this is a known FP at manifest level, documented not suppressed.
